title: Principal audit checkpoint post-ticket-149 (staged Phase 3 spine completion)
problem: ticket-149 completes the mock Phase 3 staged source processing spine through generate-run-report. Cadence is overdue (12+ done tickets since ticket-137 principal audit). A principal checkpoint is required before further Phase 3 or product-risk work.
acceptance_criteria: Read-only principal audit report documents staged Phase 3 spine completion state (discover through run report).
Audit records cadence satisfaction and recommends next smallest product-risk ticket.
No implementation code changes unless audit finds a blocking gap requiring a hardening ticket.
Golden/pytest/safety audit status recorded from current main.
non_goals: Implementation tickets in the same run.
rollback_plan: Delete audit report only; no code rollback.
